name: Planet Burger
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Garbanzo beans (canned, drained and mashed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast sunflower kernels on a baking sheet at 350 degrees F for 5 to 7 minutes until golden.
2. Combine the toasted sunflower kernels, beans, rice, onion, carrot, breadcrumbs, parsley, eggs, soy sauce, and thyme in a large bowl.
3. Form the mixture into 8 rectangular patties.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Pan-fry the burgers until thoroughly heated, about 4 minutes per side.
6. Serve on French bread with condiments.
Each serving provides:
318 calories
11.7 g. protein
7.6 g. fat
50.8 g. carbohydrate
2.4 g. dietary fiber
56 mg. cholesterol
799 mg. sodium.
Source: "Veg-able Rice"
